design_philosophy: Immersive, premium, and deeply rooted in Indian agrarian heritage, yet strictly modern and corporate. Generous whitespace, earthy tones, high-resolution textures.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-monsoon-charcoal font-serif
scales.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-monsoon-charcoal font-serif
scales.overline: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-basmati-gold font-medium font-marcellus

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-basmati-gold text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-basmati-gold/90 transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border border-basmati-gold text-basmati-gold px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-basmati-gold hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none

cards.default: bg-white border border-monsoon-charcoal/5 hover:border-basmati-gold/30 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md

inputs.default: border-b border-monsoon-charcoal/20 bg-transparent py-3 px-0 focus:border-basmati-gold focus:ring-0 outline-none text-monsoon-charcoal font-sans rounded-none w-full

page_structure.layout: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-chalk-white/90 border-b border-monsoon-charcoal/5. Logo on left, desktop nav links centered, 'Request Quote' CTA on right.

100vh full-screen. Background video loop (or static fallback) of sunset rice fields. bg-monsoon-charcoal/40 overlay. Centralized dramatic typography. Dual CTA. Bottom edge features scrolling marquee of certifications.
page_structure.content: Golden sunset Indian paddy fields, scrolling logos (ISO 9001, FSSAI, FDA, GMP, APEDA).

page_structure.layout: Asymmetrical layout. Left: Large heritage typography and story. Right: 4-card grid (Ethical Sourcing, Automated Milling, Global Logistics, Stringent QC).
page_structure.content: Use indian farmer agriculture image as a structural element or background for the narrative.

page_structure.layout: Tabs component (Shadcn customized) or standard tabbed layout. Tabs: Premium Basmati, Non-Basmati, Packaging. Data-dense technical cards for specs (grain length, moisture, broken %).
page_structure.content: Basmati rice bowl, raw rice grains, jute sack textures.

page_structure.layout: Dark section (bg-monsoon-charcoal text-white). Interactive or highly visual SVG world map. Highlighted trade routes to Middle East, Europe, USA, West Africa using Gold dots/lines.
page_structure.content: Cargo ship port container image layered subtly in the background with blend-mode.

page_structure.layout: Split layout. Left: Contact info, office addresses. Right: B2B lead form (Name, Company, Country, Product Interest, Order Qty).
page_structure.content: Simple, elegant form fields using the 'inputs' design token.

heritage_story.description: Indian farmer tending to rice fields

raw_rice_specs.description: Macro shot of uncooked basmati grains

packaging_jute.description: Jute sack texture for packaging section

global_shipping.description: Cargo ship at sunset for Global Footprint section

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for elegant, slow fade-up and slight y-axis translation on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) within hidden overflow containers. Buttons crossfade colors smoothly.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the certifications ticker. Smooth, continuous flow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js with fonts: serif: ['Cormorant Garamond', 'serif'], marcellus: ['Marcellus', 'serif'], sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'].
Ensure the hero section uses an overlay over the background image to maintain APCA text contrast.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-quote-button').
Implement a responsive tab navigation for the Product Catalog.
The Global Footprint map can be implemented using react-simple-maps or a high-quality SVG graphic with hover tooltips.
Ensure hybrid_fullstack setup: React frontend (js/jsx) with a backend (Express/Node) connecting to MongoDB to accept the Contact Form POST request and an Admin View to fetch them.
